query: Install the browzer CLI and log me in.
Set up Browzer on my machine for the first time.
I got exit code 2 not authenticated — how do I log in to browzer?
Authenticate browzer with an API key from BROWZER_API_KEY.
How do I run browzer login via the device flow?
zsh: command not found: browzer — help.
How do I update my saved browzer API key?
Log me out of browzer, then log me back in with a different account.
Am I currently logged in to Browzer?
List the Browzer workspaces in my organization.
Re-sync my browzer index on this repo.
Is browzer currently installed and authenticated on this machine?
